title: Contact — Feryal Clark MP
text_excerpt: Contact — Feryal Clark MP 0 Skip to Content Feryal Clark MP Home About Contact News Achievements Events Priorities Campaigns Banking Hub Ponders End Pledges Join my mailing list Open Menu Close Menu Open Menu Close Menu Feryal Clark MP Home About Contact News Achievements Events Priorities Campaigns Banking Hub Ponders End Pledges Join my mailing list Home About Contact News Achievements Events Priorities Folder: Campaigns Back Banking Hub Ponders End Pledges Join my mailing list PLEASE NOTE: My office in Enfield will be closed for the week commencing 5 May, opening again on 11 May but please email if you need help. Contact Me: feryal.clark.mp@parliament.uk My office can help you with things like benefits, pensions, taxes, immigration, policing and general support. Enfield North 542 Hertford Road, Enfield, EN3 5ST 020 8804 4543 PUBLIC OPENING TIMES Monday CLOSED Tuesday to Thursday 9:30am to 12:30pm & 2:30pm to 4:30pm Friday AM Appointment only & 2pm to 4pm Westminster House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA Privacy Policy Subscribe to my newsletter Email Address Submit Thank you! I will be in touch with you news and updates! FOLLOW Promoted by Hassan Yusuf, on behalf of Feryal Clark, both at Celbic Hall, 77 Lancaster Road, Enfield, EN2 0DW
